outcomes: Understand the concept of a limit and derive the derivative of polynomial functions from first principles
Apply differentiation to determine gradients of curves, equations of tangents, and stationary points (maxima and minima)
Formulate the general equation of a circle $(x-a)^2 + (y-b)^2 = r^2$ and determine its center and radius from expanded polynomial forms
Solve complex arrangement and selection problems utilizing factorial notation, permutations ($^nP_r$), and combinations ($^nC_r$)

sub_strands.sub_strand: Gas Laws and Kinetic Theory of Gases
outcomes: Verify the absolute zero temperature threshold and apply the combined gas law equations contextually
Explain gas pressure variations using the kinetic theory of matter and solve heat capacity thermal energy tasks

sub_strands.sub_strand: Magnetic Effect of an Electric Current
outcomes: Map magnetic field configurations around current-carrying conductors, solenoids, and flat coils
Determine the direction and magnitude of magnetic forces on moving charges utilizing Fleming's Left-Hand Rule
Investigate factors altering reaction kinetics (concentration, temperature, surface area, catalysts) using collision theory models
Apply Le Chatelier's Principle to predict equilibrium shifts in dynamic reversible chemical networks
Synthesize and classify primary, secondary, and tertiary alkanols and map out esterification reaction profiles
Determine structural variations and IUPAC naming protocols for alkanoic acids up to carbon-5
Analyze the structural anatomy and counter-current multiplier mechanics of the mammalian nephron unit
Examine homeostatic feedback mechanisms managed by Antidiuretic Hormone (ADH) and Aldosterone during fluid changes
Model dihybrid inheritance patterns ($9:3:3:1$ phenotypic distributions) using advanced genetic matrix diagrams
Trace sex-linked traits including hemophilia and color blindness across generational pedigree charts
